SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-11-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, FRANCIS $6,250.00 PRINCIPAL, $117.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,367.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
